body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/updateVerifySts 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/updateVerifySts 
 ## 接口描述 
将发票签收状态设置为已签收，并改变关联单据的核验状态。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billType","required":true,"maxLength":"1","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","desc":"%20%E5%8F%96%E5%80%BC%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%5B%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%5D(https%3A%2F%2Fxft.cmbchina.com%2Fopen%2F%23%2Fdoc%2Fopen-document%3Fid%3D10692%26mid%3D11585)","exampleValue":"4"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"signStaffName","required":true,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6%E4%BA%BA%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"test1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"signStaffId","required":false,"maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%AD%BE%E6%94%B6%E4%BA%BAid","desc":"%20%E5%90%AB%E4%B9%89%E4%B8%8EempId%E7%9B%B8%E5%90%8C%E3%80%82signStaffId%E3%80%81empNumber%E5%92%8CempPhone%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%B6%E4%B8%80","exampleValue":"U0000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","required":false,"maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20signStaffId%E3%80%81empNumber%E5%92%8CempPhone%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%B6%E4%B8%80%E3%80%82","exampleValue":"41904"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empPhone","required":false,"maxLength":"12","label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E6%89%8B%E6%9C%BA%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20signStaffId%E3%80%81empNumber%E5%92%8CempPhone%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E5%85%B6%E4%B8%80%E3%80%82","exampleValue":"14900000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"invoiceInfo","label":"%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%AE%9E%E4%BD%93%E5%AF%B9%E8%B1%A1","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%8D%E6%98%AF%E4%B8%BA5%2C6%2C7%2CE%2CF%2CZ%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","maxLength":"50","label":"%E5% 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%2Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%88%96%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### **请求示例**
 
```json
{
    "billType": "4",
    "signStaffName": "test1",
    "signStaffId": "U0000",
    "empNumber": "41904",
    "empPhone": "14900000000",
    "invoiceInfo": {
        "invoiceNo": "04829364",
        "invoiceCode": "5000204130",
        "trafficNo": null,
        "trafficCode": null
    },
    "trafficInfo": {
        "invoiceNo": null,
        "invoiceCode": null,
        "trafficNo": null,
        "trafficCode": null
    }
}
```
 
### **返回示例**
正常：
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功"
}
```
异常：
如果没有传入必填信息，返回样例：
未传入发票类型
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票类型必填，请检查信息是否完整"
}
```
未传入签收人姓名
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "签收人姓名必填，请检查信息是否完整"
}
```
如果没有传入签收人信息，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "缺少签收人信息"
}
```
如果找不到对应员工，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "找不到对应的员工信息:U0000"
}
```
如果传入签收人信息与签收人姓名不一致，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票签收人姓名与发票签收人信息不一致"
}
```
如果没有传发票信息，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票信息为空或不完整"
}
```
如果传入了其他公司的发票信息，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "存在其他公司的发票"
}
```
如果发票完全不属于当前公司，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票不在当前公司下"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 200| 成功 | 无                            | |

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/updateVerifySts

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/updateVerifySts

接口描述

将发票签收状态设置为已签收，并改变关联单据的核验状态。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%2Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%B6%88%E6%81%AF","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%88%96%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求示例

{
    "billType": "4",
    "signStaffName": "test1",
    "signStaffId": "U0000",
    "empNumber": "41904",
    "empPhone": "14900000000",
    "invoiceInfo": {
        "invoiceNo": "04829364",
        "invoiceCode": "5000204130",
        "trafficNo": null,
        "trafficCode": null
    },
    "trafficInfo": {
        "invoiceNo": null,
        "invoiceCode": null,
        "trafficNo": null,
        "trafficCode": null
    }
}

返回示例

正常：

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功"
}

异常： 如果没有传入必填信息，返回样例： 未传入发票类型

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票类型必填，请检查信息是否完整"
}

未传入签收人姓名

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "签收人姓名必填，请检查信息是否完整"
}

如果没有传入签收人信息，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "缺少签收人信息"
}

如果找不到对应员工，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "找不到对应的员工信息:U0000"
}

如果传入签收人信息与签收人姓名不一致，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票签收人姓名与发票签收人信息不一致"
}

如果没有传发票信息，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票信息为空或不完整"
}

如果传入了其他公司的发票信息，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "存在其他公司的发票"
}

如果发票完全不属于当前公司，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票不在当前公司下"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
